title: derris polyanthra
intro: Derris polyanthra, a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, is a legume used as a medicinal herb and in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Derris polyanthra include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antivenom agent. Herbal preparations of Derris polyanthra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
